'''鈭歸-sh-ng-ch''' ('''kawashngechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monkeypatch|monkeypatch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-sh-ng-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monkeypatch|monkeypatch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-sh-ng-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kawashngechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwashngechoko|thiwashngechoko]] || [[word:jiwashngechoko|jiwashngechoko]] || [[word:shiwashngechoko|shiwashngechoko]] || [[word:kiwashngechoko|kiwashngechoko]]
|-
